pages.text: Stoves and forges are good for food and metallurgy, but I could use something more advanced. I know that Valks in the Aether commonly use effective burners for powering everything from their war machine to kōji tea. I could use that for powering an $(l:innovation/alchemy/alembic)alembic$().
This burner is not easy to craft, and I might have much better luck trying to source one from abandoned Valken outposts or lodges in the Aether.
This is how it works: uwu
